title: Hermès Constance 18 Noir Epsom
collection_description: Compact crossbody bag with the signature oversized H-clasp buckle.
description:
Hermès Constance 18 in Noir Epsom leather. 18 x 15 x 5 cm.

Compact crossbody bag defined by the signature oversized H-clasp closure. Features a sleek front flap, adjustable shoulder strap, and interior with multiple card slots and a flat pocket.
details_interior: Multiple card slots and one flat pocket
